subcodes.first_line: O bondsman of Bahá! Though thou art a servant, yet upon thy head resteth the crown of servitude to the All-Merciful, and thou art established upon the throne of everlasting glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای غلام بهاء غلامی اما تاج عبودیت حضرت رحمانیت بسر داری و بر سریر عزت ابدیه
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @wisdom [hikmat]
